title: H1B Job Hunter — Inputs
description: Search for H1B-sponsoring jobs using keywords scraped directly from company ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, etc.) via Google.

keywords.title: * Search Keywords (one per line)
keywords.description: These keywords are searched inside job descriptions on ATS platforms. Use terms that appear IN job descriptions — not just titles. Examples for Audit: CPA, GAAP, internal audit, SOX. Examples for Data: SQL, Python, Tableau. Examples for Finance: FP&A, financial modeling, CFA.

location.title: * Location
location.description: City and State (e.g. Chicago, IL) or United States for a nationwide search. Leave as United States to get the most results.

timeFilter.title: * Time Filter — How Recent Should Jobs Be?
timeFilter.description: Filter job postings by how recently they were indexed by Google. Past 24 Hours is recommended for daily runs. Use Past Week or All for a broader initial search.

skills.title: * Your Skills (one per line) — used for Skill Match Score
skills.description: List your skills one per line. Each skill is matched against the full job description to calculate your Skill Match Score from 1 to 10. The more specific and relevant your skills, the more accurate the score.
skills.default:
CPA
GAAP
Excel
SQL
Internal audit
SOX compliance
Financial reporting
Risk assessment
Data analysis
Communication

resumeText.title: Resume Text (optional)
resumeText.description: Paste your full resume text here. It will be combined with your skills list to improve the Skill Match Score accuracy. Leave blank if not needed.

optEndDate.title: OPT / STEM OPT End Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
optEndDate.description: Your EAD card expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format, for example 2026-06-30. Used to calculate urgency of finding H1B sponsorship. Leave blank if not applicable.

maxJobsPerKeyword.title: Max Jobs Per Keyword
maxJobsPerKeyword.description: Maximum number of job links to collect per keyword across all 40 ATS platforms. Recommended value is 30. Higher values take longer but return more results.

excludeStaffingAgencies.title: Exclude Staffing and Consulting Agencies?
excludeStaffingAgencies.description: When enabled, known staffing agencies and body-shop consulting firms are removed from results. Recommended to keep this on since ATS platforms mostly have direct employers anyway.

minimumVisaScore.title: Minimum Visa Friendliness Score (1 to 10)
minimumVisaScore.description: Jobs scoring below this threshold are excluded from the output. Set to 1 to see all results. Jobs with explicit no-sponsorship language in the description are always excluded regardless of this setting.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description: Choose how you want your results saved. CSV is best for opening in Excel or Google Sheets. JSON is best for developers. Both saves in both formats.
